details.new_definition:
skill :l0_governance do
  version "1.1"
  title "L0 Governance Rules"
  
  guarantees do
    self_referential
    human_oversight
  end
  
  evolve do
    allow :content
    deny :behavior
    deny :guarantees
  end
  
  behavior do
    {
      allowed_skills: [
        :core_safety,
        :l0_governance,
        :evolution_rules,
        :layer_awareness,
        :approval_workflow,
        :self_inspection,
        :chain_awareness,
        :audit_rules,
        :skill_generator
      ],

details.reason: Add Knowledge Evolution section to constitution: end-of-session reflection trigger for L1 knowledge registration. Moved Skill Evolution Criteria under this new section.

Upgrade from tutorial mode to researcher mode. Draft reviewed by 3-agent team (scientific rigor, KairosChain integration, UX/token efficiency) and refined through Persona Assembly discussion (kairos, conservative, pragmatic, skeptic — 2 rounds, full consensus). Key decisions: privacy preflight as mandatory gate (warn+acknowledge), Diamond Cycle compressed to 4 lines with L1 delegation, baseline knowledge expanded to 14 entries, session continuity scan added.
Switch from tutorial mode to researcher mode after full review process (3-agent review + Persona Assembly consensus).
